top3.sql:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE 
        WHEN a_budget.amount > o_budget.amount THEN 1 
        ELSE 0 
    END) AS count
FROM event e1
JOIN budget a_budget ON e1.event_id = a_budget.link_to_event
JOIN event e2
JOIN budget o_budget ON e2.event_id = o_budget.link_to_event
WHERE e1.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff'
  AND e2.event_name = 'October Meeting'
  AND a_budget.category = 'Advertisement'
  AND o_budget.category = 'Advertisement';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM budget b1
JOIN event e1 ON b1.link_to_event = e1.event_id
JOIN budget b2 ON b1.category = b2.category
JOIN event e2 ON b2.link_to_event = e2.event_id
WHERE b1.category = 'Advertisement'
  AND e1.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff'
  AND e2.event_name = 'October Meeting'
  AND b1.amount > b2.amount;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE 
        WHEN a_budget.amount > o_budget.amount THEN 1 
        ELSE 0 
    END) AS count
FROM event e1
JOIN budget a_budget ON e1.event_id = a_budget.link_to_event
JOIN event e2
JOIN budget o_budget ON e2.event_id = o_budget.link_to_event
WHERE e1.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff'
  AND e2.event_name = 'October Meeting'
  AND a_budget.category = 'Advertisement'
  AND o_budget.category = 'Advertisement';

SELECT COUNT(*) AS count
FROM (
    SELECT a_budget.amount AS kickoff_amount, o_budget.amount AS oct_amount
    FROM event e1
    JOIN budget a_budget ON e1.event_id = a_budget.link_to_event
    JOIN event e2
    JOIN budget o_budget ON e2.event_id = o_budget.link_to_event
    WHERE e1.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff'
      AND e2.event_name = 'October Meeting'
      AND a_budget.category = 'Advertisement'
      AND o_budget.category = 'Advertisement'
) 
WHERE kickoff_amount > oct_amount;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM (
  SELECT b1.amount AS kickoff_budget, b2.amount AS oct_budget
  FROM budget b1
  JOIN event e1 ON b1.link_to_event = e1.event_id
  JOIN budget b2 ON b1.category = b2.category
  JOIN event e2 ON b2.link_to_event = e2.event_id
  WHERE b1.category = 'Advertisement'
    AND e1.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff'
    AND e2.event_name = 'October Meeting'
    AND b1.amount > b2.amount
) subquery;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE 
        WHEN a_budget.amount > o_budget.amount THEN 1 
        ELSE 0 
    END) AS count
FROM event e1
JOIN budget a_budget ON e1.event_id = a_budget.link_to_event
JOIN event e2
JOIN budget o_budget ON e2.event_id = o_budget.link_to_event
WHERE e1.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff'
  AND e2.event_name = 'October Meeting'
  AND a_budget.category = 'Advertisement'
  AND o_budget.category = 'Advertisement';

SELECT COUNT(*) AS count
FROM (
    SELECT a_budget.amount AS kickoff_amount, o_budget.amount AS oct_amount
    FROM event e1
    JOIN budget a_budget ON e1.event_id = a_budget.link_to_event
    JOIN event e2
    JOIN budget o_budget ON e2.event_id = o_budget.link_to_event
    WHERE e1.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff'
      AND e2.event_name = 'October Meeting'
      AND a_budget.category = 'Advertisement'
      AND o_budget.category = 'Advertisement'
) 
WHERE kickoff_amount > oct_amount;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM (
  SELECT b1.amount AS kickoff_budget, b2.amount AS oct_budget
  FROM budget b1
  JOIN event e1 ON b1.link_to_event = e1.event_id
  JOIN budget b2 ON b1.category = b2.category
  JOIN event e2 ON b2.link_to_event = e2.event_id
  WHERE b1.category = 'Advertisement'
    AND e1.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff'
    AND e2.event_name = 'October Meeting'
    AND b1.amount > b2.amount
) subquery;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE 
        WHEN a_budget.amount > o_budget.amount THEN 1 
        ELSE 0 
    END) AS count
FROM event e1
JOIN budget a_budget ON e1.event_id = a_budget.link_to_event
JOIN event e2
JOIN budget o_budget ON e2.event_id = o_budget.link_to_event
WHERE e1.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff'
  AND e2.event_name = 'October Meeting'
  AND a_budget.category = 'Advertisement'
  AND o_budget.category = 'Advertisement';
